---
title: "About"
---

## Timothy Hartzog

I build AI-powered tools, interactive data analysis platforms, and custom software
that help businesses move faster with confidence.

### Services

- **Data Analysis & Visualization** — Interactive dashboards and reports
- **AI & Machine Learning** — Custom AI solutions from prototype to production
- **Technical Training** — Hands-on workshops for teams
- **Software Development** — High-performance web applications

### Contact

Reach out via [GitHub](https://github.com/timothyhartzog) to discuss how we can
help with your next project.
